name: The Fun Gang - Deltarune
description:
"I Just Want To Make Everyone Smile. And If I Become An Evil Villain To Accomplish That, Is That Bad?"

—Queen

The Fun Gang is a group of heroes who want to save the Dark World from the clutches of evil. Kris, Susie, Noelle and Berdly were originally from the Light World, while Ralsei and Lancer was born in the Dark World. They originate from the game Deltarune.

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

๋ ࣭ ⭑๋ ࣭ ⭑Meet The Gang๋ ࣭ ⭑๋ ࣭ ⭑

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

╰┈➤「 ✦ K r i s ✦ 」

(It's what they call "you.")

—Kris's Mirror

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

Kris is a human Lightner and the main protagonist of Deltarune. They are presumably the human Hero of Light in the Prophecy. In a Dark World, they function as the party's leader.

During the events of Deltarune, Kris is mentioned to be an introvert. Susie and King refer to Kris as a "quiet person," and Noelle is astonished if they converse about "anything."After Kris's brother, Asriel, left for college, they became distant from their few friends. Kris's side of their shared bedroom is also strikingly bare. The shared game console is underneath Asriel's bed, and their old children's books are in Toriel 's classroom instead. Toriel has also mentioned that Kris is not normally energetic. They have a history of not waking up on time, and often slept through the start of class. Kris also preferred their mother driving them to and from school than walking.

Contrary to Kris's apparent detachment, they do have a variety of interests. Kris has always been mischievous, pulling dark pranks such as covering themselves in ketchup and claiming it was blood.

╰┈➤「 ✦ S u s i e ✦ 」

"Me? Some kind of hero or something?"

—Susie

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

Susie is a Lightner from Hometown and one of the deuteragonists of Deltarune. She is presumably the monster Hero of Light of the Legend of Delta Rune.
